title: Parse a log level
prompt_md:
Structured logs usually start with a level in brackets, like `[INFO] started`.

Write `parse_level(line)` that returns the level token inside the leading brackets:

- `"[INFO] started"` -> `"INFO"`
- `"[ERROR] boom"` -> `"ERROR"`
- a line with no bracket -> `"UNKNOWN"`
hints: Check that the line contains both "[" and "]". If not, return "UNKNOWN".
Slice between the brackets: find the index of "[" and "]" and take the substring between them.
